compiled_state.title: Create explore agent structured output prompt template
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md`. Note: the `prompts/` directory does not exist yet — create it with `mkdir -p`.

Template sections:
1. **Exploration Request**: `{exploration_request}` placeholder for caller to fill
2. **Output Format Requirements**: Produce a numbered file list. Each entry: number, file path, categorization (relevance: primary/secondary/tangential, type: source/test/config/doc)
3. **Completeness Self-Check**: After producing the file list, verify all artifacts named in the request are covered. For each term in the request, confirm at least one matching file. If any term has zero matches, output: "WARNING: No files found for term: <term>"
4. **Term Matching**: Match ALL terms from the exploration request independently. If the request mentions "ticket references, config files, and test helpers", search for each category separately — not just the primary search term.
5. **Output Example**: Show the numbered format with categorization fields

Tech-stack-agnostic: NO references to .tickets/, plugins/dso/, app/src/, or other project-specific paths.

TDD: Task 7c68-fab9 RED tests go GREEN.

### File Impact
- Create: `plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/` (directory)
- Create: `plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md`
- Edit: `.test-index` (remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-explore-dispatch-template.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-explore-dispatch-template.sh
- [ ] Template exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md
- [ ] Contains numbered list instruction
  Verify: grep -qi "numbered\|enumerated" plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md
- [ ] Contains categorization
  Verify: grep -qi "categoriz\|primary.*secondary\|relevance" plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md
- [ ] Contains completeness self-check
  Verify: grep -qi "completeness.*check\|verify.*all.*artifacts\|all.*terms.*covered" plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md
- [ ] Contains term matching
  Verify: grep -qi "match.*all.*terms\|each.*term.*independently\|not just the primary" plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md
- [ ] No DSO-specific paths (negative constraint)
  Verify: ! grep -qE '\.tickets/|plugins/dso/|app/src/' plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md
- [ ] Contains request placeholder
  Verify: grep -q '{exploration_request}' plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: grep -q 'explore-structured-output.md.*test-explore-dispatch-template.sh' .test-index && ! grep -q 'explore-structured-output.md.*test-explore-dispatch-template.sh.*\[' .test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Notes

### File location rationale
The template at `plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/prompts/explore-structured-output.md` is NOT loaded by scripts — it is read by LLM agents (orchestrators, sprint skill) when they construct dispatch prompts for Explore agents. This parallels how `task-execution.md` templates are read by the sprint orchestrator. The `agent-profiles/prompts/` path groups prompt templates with agent configuration.

### Integration point
The template becomes useful when callers reference it. Story a478-a167 (docs update, blocked by this story) will update CLAUDE.md/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md to document the template path for orchestrators. No script-level wiring is needed — the template is a convention, not a programmatic dependency.

### .test-index edit
Task 1 adds the RED marker line. Task 2 removes the marker bracket from the same line. This is the standard RED→GREEN .test-index pattern, not a conflict.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
